message:
refactor(workflows): remove extracted engine and runner code from mod.rs [ft-c45am]

Completes the engine.rs and runner.rs extraction by removing the source
sections from mod.rs. Production code in mod.rs now reduced to ~71 lines
(imports, type aliases, elapsed_ms helper). Test suite remains (~13,641 lines).

mod.rs: 13,712 → 11,019 lines.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
